prose:
**Ethylene frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz` (single-point on the input geometry, not optimized at DFT). SCF converged in 6 cycles. No warnings reported.

Results:
- HOMO (index 7) = −7.6155818 eV
- LUMO (index 8) = −0.17986527 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV

Reproducibility:
- Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmprlhxj7m7/live.json`
- Output JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmprlhxj7m7/live.json`
- No live `.out` log path was surfaced by the tool.
